apiKey.name: Abacus AI API Key
apiKey.hint: Your ChatLLM API key from Abacus AI. Keep this private — it will be sent with every request. World-scoped, GM-only.

modelName.name: AI Model
modelName.hint: Model identifier to use for generation. Defaults to gemini-3.0-flash. Any model exposed by your Abacus AI deployment is acceptable.

apiEndpoint.name: API Endpoint
apiEndpoint.hint: Chat-completions endpoint URL. Defaults to https://api.abacus.ai/v1/chat/completions. Override if you proxy through a custom backend.

intensity.name: Skald Intensity
intensity.hint: How dramatic and verbose the Skald speaks (1 = terse, 10 = full saga-singer operatic).

autoNarrateCombat.name: Auto-Narrate Combat
autoNarrateCombat.hint: When enabled, the Skald posts a short flavour line at the start of each combatant's turn.

autoControlEnemies.name: AI Controls Enemies
autoControlEnemies.hint: When enabled, the Skald takes the turn for any non-player combatant: deciding action, moving the token, rolling the attack, applying harm, then advancing the turn.

memoryLength.name: Conversation Memory
memoryLength.hint: How many recent messages the Skald remembers per conversation channel.

commands.oracle: Roll an Ironsworn oracle and have the Skald interpret it.
commands.lore: Generate world-building lore and create a Journal Entry.
commands.combat: Get tactical narration/advice for the current combat.

errors.noApiKey: No Abacus AI API key is set. Open Module Settings → The Eternal Skald and provide your key.
errors.emptySkald: Speak, Ironsworn. Usage: /skald <your question or prompt>
errors.emptyNpc: Name the one you would meet. Usage: /npc <name or description>
errors.emptyLore: What chronicle shall I write? Usage: /lore <topic>

ui.thinking: The Eternal Skald listens to the wind…
